contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Edgar->dao_protocol PR6 (final ramp): /qr-code-check flip + stripe order-sync delegation + Sidekiq topology fix
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1070
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/sentiment_importer/pull/1069
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/215
  
  Details:
  Completed the final ramp of the Edgar -> dao_protocol migration. PR6a: exact-match nginx flip of /qr-code-check + /link-email to the dao_protocol service (:8010); verified the read-only lookup path live (Python serves it + journal), payment paths (MINTED->Stripe session, session_id->SOLD reconcile, /link-email write) left for operator testing with real Stripe; conf mirrored to sentiment_importer/config/nginx.conf #1069. PR6b: changed Rails webhook_controller#stripe so checkout.session.completed delegates the order-sync audit log via a synchronous rescued localhost POST to :8010/stripe/order_sync (replaces MetaCheckoutOrderSyncWorker); merged #1070, activates on next Rails web restart. Also corrected a factual error in the context docs: I had wrongly concluded Sidekiq was dead by checking the vestigial unit on the web box -- Sidekiq actually runs on the seni_sk_new worker host. Added a prominent topology warning to NOTES_sentiment_importer.md (#215) + a reference memory so future agents check the worker host, and fixed the AGROVERSE_INVENTORY dormancy wording. All 6 routes now cut over (PR2-PR6); remaining is operator-driven: restart seni_ror to activate PR6b, payment-path live testing, PR7 cleanup.
- Contributor(s): Gary Teh
- TDG Issued: 100.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
